creator: asomers@FreeBSD.org
text: Unfortunately it isn't possible to implement this feature in FreeBSD.  The VFS abstraction hides that information from the file system.  It only works in Linux because Linux doesn't have any kind of VFS.  See https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=236340 for more discussion.  My recommendation is to find out why gvsd-fuse thinks it needs that flag.  It probably doesn't.
